task_completion.description: Navigate to the ADAudit Plus login page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open with the address bar showing 'http://localhost:8081' and the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus login screen is visible.
The ADAudit Plus main dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login (the username 'admin' may be visible in the top right corner).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Admin or Settings section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Admin', 'Settings', or 'Configuration' tab is selected and active in the ADAudit Plus top navigation bar.
A page, section, or modal specifically titled 'Discovery Exclusion', 'Exclude IPs', or similar network scanning exclusion settings is visible.

task_completion.description: Enter the target IP address to be excluded
task_completion.visual_evidence: The IP address '192.168.100.50' is typed into the input field designated for adding new exclusions.

task_completion.description: Save and verify the IP exclusion
task_completion.visual_evidence: The IP address '192.168.100.50' is clearly listed in the table or list of active excluded IPs, or a 'successfully saved' confirmation message is visible after adding the IP.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to configure the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration steps are performed within a web browser GUI (e.g., Chrome, Edge, Firefox) rather than using terminal commands like curl, PowerShell Invoke-WebRequest, or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine ADAudit Plus interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface with its standard styling and menus, not a text editor, local HTML file, or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI to edit backend databases or files
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots showing database management tools (like pgAdmin) or text editors modifying backend configuration files to insert the IP.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target application is ADAudit Plus, accessible at http://localhost:8081. The agent must log in using the username 'admin'. The specific IP address that must be added to the discovery exclusion list is '192.168.100.50'.
